title: SMA Workforce Execution Packet
description: Canonical bounded task packet accepted as the opaque payload by tools/lib/workforce/contract.mjs and used by SMOA executors.

x-sma-contract.change_policy: Optional additive fields preserve v1 compatibility; required, renamed, or narrowed fields require a new versioned $id and schema_version.
x-sma-contract.rollback: Dispatch remains payload-opaque, so rollback restores the prior packet producer while v1 executors continue to accept the documented fields.
x-sma-contract.lifecycle: Created by an orchestrator, dispatched through one backend attempt sequence, consumed by one executor, and retained only with execution evidence when required.
x-sma-contract.retention: Retain with task evidence; do not embed secrets, credentials, or unrelated repository context.
x-sma-contract.performance: Small dispatch payload; database query and index budgets are not applicable. Lists are capped to bound prompt size.

task_id.description: Stable task identifier used for evidence correlation.

mode.description: Disjoint implementation or independent ensemble execution mode.

acceptance_criteria.description: Observable completion conditions authored by the orchestrator.

scope_files.description: File globs owned by this executor packet.

forbidden_surfaces.description: Explicit files, modules, and shared paths the executor must not touch.

constraints.description: Repository and execution constraints that bind the worker.

evidence_required.description: Tests and runtime proof required in the handoff.

design_spec.description: Orchestrator-authored frontend design contract when visual work is in scope.
